/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT RE VICTIM RESTITUTION/DAWT/CTORD: MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: IT HAS BEEN FOUR MONTHS AND NO RESTITUTION HAS BEEN DETERMINED, HOWEVER, THE COURT WILL RETAIN JURISDICTION OVER VICTIMRESTITUTION,/

/TWS/CH6 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 84D/CTS 84/SAORD/SA1 JESPER JENSEN/SA1 BERARDO AMAZAN/DEF:SHALL STAY OUT OFF AREA BORDERED BY 23RD STREET (NORTH), FOLSOM STREET(EAST), CESAR CHAVEZ STREET (SOUTH), BARLETT (WEST)/SAORD3/VF2:120/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/REST:TBD BY PTD/OBEY/ACCEP/CONTD:PRE-TRIAL REPORT FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION ON 10-11-12/DOP/

/CAL BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/X PEOPLE AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD ACOUNT 6, PENAL CODE SECTION 242, MISDEMANOR,/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 6/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/IBARRA/

/CAL:PROG RPT RE LCA- HOME DETN & TO SET BIFURCATED PRELIM/CTORD:SCRAMM DEVICE REQUIREMENT IS DELETED,  LCA TO CONDUCT THE  URINALYSIS TEST WHEN JUVENILE PROBATION IS NO LONGER CONDUCTING THE TEST,  CURFEW ISMODIFIED TO INCLUDE SUPERVISED FAMILY ACTIVITIES WITH  PRIOR PERMISSION FROM LCA/CONTD:PROG RPT RE LCA-HOME DETN ON 08-24-12/CONTD:FOR BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 09-12-12/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WITEXCL:DA & DEFENSE COUSEL/WIT SWORN:JESPER JENSEN/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1-VIDEO; 2-COLOR MAP; 3-PHOTO OF VICTIMS'FRONT OF FACE;4-PHOTO OF VICTIMS' LEFT SIDE OF FACE/EXHM:DEFENSE A- DIAGRAM OF INTERSCTION OF MISSION & 26TH STREET; B- CLOSE UP OF DIAGRAM IN DEFENSE A/DEFT WVCPX/CTORD:DEFENDANTS ARE RELEASED TO LCA- HOME DETENTION WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS,  DEFENDANT IS TO OBEY BY CURFEW FROM 7AM-7 PM; CONSUME NO ALCOHOLOR ILLEGAL DRUGS; PARTICIPATE IN LCA CASE MANAGEMENT; STAY OUT OF AREABOUNDED BY 23RD STREET, CESAR CHAVEZ STREET, FOLSOM STREET & BARTLET STREET; STAY AWAY 100 YARDS FROM JESPER JENSEN & BERNARDO ALMAZAN/X:STAY AWAY ORDER WAS NOT FILED BY THE PEOPLE TODAY/DOP/CONTD:PROG REPORT RE LCA- HOME DETN & TO SET BIFURCATED PRELIM/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:FELONY COMPLAINT ARREST WARRANT FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:MURRAY ZISHOLZ/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 07-12-12/BAIL:150,000/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:PTD REPORT RE VICTIM REST/DEF:IS APPEARING IN CUSTODY, HE IS IN CUSTODY IN CASE #12021516/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PROG RPT RE LCA- HOME DETN/OREVKD/NUNC1:REMAND/NUNCDAT:08-21-12/SHER/BAIL:150000/X:CONFIRM PRELIM HEARING DATE OF 09-12-12/DOP/
